articles.title: Body found in river near Brockton water treatment plant, DA says
articles.description:
Authorities said they have not been able to identify the deceased man.

The post Body found in river near Brockton water treatment plant, DA says appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Authorities discovered a body in the river near Brockton water treatment plant.
The deceased man has not yet been identified by officials.
This incident raises concerns about safety and water quality for nearby residents.
